allow: Bash(node -e "const s = require\('sharp'\); s\(Buffer.from\('<svg xmlns=\\"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg\\" width=\\"10\\" height=\\"10\\"><rect width=\\"10\\" height=\\"10\\" fill=\\"red\\"/></svg>'\)\).png\(\).toBuffer\(\).then\(b => console.log\('sharp ok, size:', b.length\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('sharp error:', e.message\)\)")
